task_completion.description: Create a new Event Rule with the 'Soft Trigger' event
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Event Rules' dialog is open, and a rule is being configured with the 'Event' dropdown or column set to 'Soft Trigger'.

task_completion.description: Set the trigger to be available only on the 'Entrance Camera'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Event section of the rule, the 'At' or 'Cameras' field is explicitly set to 'Entrance Camera'.

task_completion.description: Name the trigger 'OPEN GATE' and select the Door/Gate icon
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' field for the Soft Trigger is set to 'OPEN GATE', and the icon button next to it displays a door or gate symbol.

task_completion.description: Set the Action to 'Do HTTP request'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' dropdown or column for the rule is set to 'Do HTTP request'.

task_completion.description: Configure the HTTP request with the correct POST method and URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Action configuration area, the HTTP Method is set to 'POST' and the URL field contains exactly 'http://192.168.1.200/api/v1/controls/relay1/activate'.

task_completion.description: Configure Basic Authentication with the correct credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Authentication type is set to 'Basic'. The Login/Username field contains 'gate_admin'. The Password field contains text (which may be masked as asterisks/dots, representing 'SecureGatePassword!').

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness VMS GUI to configure the event rule
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness desktop client's 'Event Rules' graphical interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts interacting with the Nx API.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nx Witness application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the Nx Witness client (typically a dark-themed interface with camera viewing grids and a resource tree on the left), not a mock UI or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent opened the technical manual to retrieve the credentials
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the file '/home/ga/Documents/gate_controller_manual.txt' opened in a text editor or terminal (like cat/nano/gedit) to read the API details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera must be 'Entrance Camera'. The trigger name must be 'OPEN GATE'. The HTTP request must use the POST method to the URL 'http://192.168.1.200/api/v1/controls/relay1/activate'. The Basic Auth credentials are username 'gate_admin' and password 'SecureGatePassword!'.
